titleStmt.title: SII 9.221: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 221. (A.R. No. 344 of 1926.) ON A STONE PLANTED IN A FIELD TO THE NORTH OF THE VILLAGE, TOGARAKUNTA, DHARMAVARAM TALUK, ANANTAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and not dated. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Tribhuvanamalladēva ruling from Jayantīpura. It records the grant of two flowergardens and house sites by the Daṇḍanāyaka Kommaṇayya and others to the basadi of Chandraprabhadēva at Togarikuṇṭe in Kuḍiyape forty for conducting worship in the basadi. The gift was made for the merit of the Mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Kumāra-Tailapadēva. The record refers at the end to Padmaṇandi. The mention of prince Kumāra-Tailapadēva would show that the record belongs to the reign of Vikramāditya VI.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁ
bhīraśyādvādāmōghalāṁ
cchanaṁ . jīyāttraiḷōkanātha
sya sāsanaṁ jinasāsanaṁ .
bhadramastu jinasāsanāya saṁbha
dratāṁ pratividhānahētavē
Anyavādimadahastimasta
kasphāṭanāya ghaṭanē paṭhīya
sē . svasti bhuvanāśraya śrīpṛ
thvīvallabha mahārājādhi
rāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭā
raka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka
cāḷukyābharaṇa śrīmattri
bhuvanamalladēvara vijaya
rājyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipra
vardhdhamānamāca(ṁ)ndrārkkatāraṁ
salutta jayantīpurada ne
levīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvi
nōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire ta
tpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigata
paṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷē
śvaraṁ jayāṁganādhīśvaranupa
hasitamanasijamūrtti
kīlāḷitakīrtti vēṁgīśaghaṁ
davadahananantaṟpu
yapavana cōḷakuḻaku
mārttaṇḍa madavetti
rāyakumārape
ḷitabaṁ
gattaṇa cā
vāśapattavṛtti
māḷavakāminī
jāhanijasainya
nnāhakakarakadana
bahaḷa
labdhaprakāṣa
drāvaṇanagandhi
drāpaṇa
nārāyaṇabrā
dasudhākara pa
nasaṁpatkara śrī
maccandaladēvīnayana
sarasijasūryyana
pratihatadhairyya gu
rujanapadaraṁjita cō
ḷakaṭakarakṣapāḷannā
mādisamastapraśasti
sahitaṁ śrīmanmahā
maṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ ku
māraṁ tailapadēva
vāḍi sāsi
tripurāṁtaka vai
sadiṁdalaḷiyaṁ siṁdavā
nāḍa perggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ ko
mmaṇayyapramukhakaraṇaṁ
gaḷu sūryyagrahaṇanimitta
diṁ kuḍiyapenālvattaṟa baḷi
ya bāḍaṁ togarikuṁṭeya basa
diya caṁdraprabhadēvara nivēdya
kka(ṁ)vaṁgabhōgakkaṁ riṣiyarā
hāradānakkaṁ khaṁḍasphaṭika
jīrnnōddhārakkaṁ biṭṭa mo
ge mattaru hanneraḍu ma
nenivēsaṇaveraḍu pūvi
na tōṁṭamoṁdu gāṇamoṁ
du kāvaḻamoṁdu I dharmmamaṁ
pratipāḷisidavargge śrīvāra
ṇāsiyalu sāsira
kavileyananibaru caturvē
dapāragargge dānaṁgeyda phala
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētu
rnripāṇāṁ kālē kālē pāla
nīyōdbhava sarvvānētān bhā
vinaṟpārtthivēṁdrān bhū
yō bhūyō yācatē
rāmabhadra[ḥ .*] svadattaṁ para
dattaṁ vā yō harēti va
sundharāṁ saṣṭirvvarṣa
srāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
kṛmiḥ . śrīma
krōṇūru
padmaṇandisi
vara śiṣya pra
tīrtthadēvara
Digital edition of SII 9.221 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
